title: verbascum × ilgazdagense
intro: Verbascum × ilgazdagense, a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, is a type of flowering plant known for its large yellow flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × ilgazdagense include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs, making it a valuable herb for respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues.
